a:r.a:t: aligned with or above direct competitors
50th–75th percentiles in Vacation Ownership survey data
. While alignment is lower vs. broader industry, competitor and industry benchmarks are more relevant given the niche nature of lower-level marketing roles in vacation ownership.
Directors are aligned with direct competitors and Vacation Ownership survey data
, which may impact the ability to attract talent from outside the vacation ownership industry.

At the VP level, HGV is aligned with direct competitors and broader industry, but falls below the 50th percentile within Vacation Ownership, indicating potential misalignment within its core peer group.
HGV pay mix is more variable-heavy than its core peer group (direct competitors and Vacation Ownership), with
peers typically around 50/50 to 60/40 (base/variable) vs. HGV closer to 40/60
base salary is a key driver of attrition
, suggesting an opportunity to rebalance pay mix.
Broader industry comparisons are less relevant for pay mix alignment, as marketing roles outside Vacation Ownership are typically not eligible for sales incentive plans.
